untranslatable_reason: The signal requires a 'breadth indicator' (market breadth/breadth of market) which is not in the allowed indicators list. price_pos_20 and hvol_20 are used as proxies for price position and volatility, but true breadth indicators (advance/decline line, breadth momentum, etc.) are not available. Additionally, the confirmation requirement of '2+ consecutive bars' cannot be directly expressed without historical bar state tracking.
translation_notes: Attempted translation using price_pos_20 (price position in 20-bar range, 0-1 scale) as a channel-normalized price proxy and hvol_20 (20-bar historical volatility) as a breadth proxy. The divergence logic maps to opposite quartile positions: long entry when price_pos_20 > 0.75 AND hvol_20 < 0.25; short entry when price_pos_20 < 0.25 AND hvol_20 > 0.75. Exit when series return to mid-range (0.25-0.75) or price moves 2% against entry. Note: This is a degraded translation due to unavailable true breadth indicators.
